let rec alpha_beta si (b : Bridge.board) alpha_in beta depth ply pv pv_len =
  si.nodes <- si.nodes + 1;
  pv_len.(0) <- 0;
  if si.stop then 0
  else begin
    (* Check for repetition *)
    let hash = Zobrist.hash_board b in
    if ply > 0 && (is_repetition si hash || b.half_moves >= 100) then 0
    else if depth <= 0 then
      quiescence si b alpha_in beta 32
    else begin
      let alpha = ref alpha_in in
      let side = b.side in
      let opp = 1 - side in
      let in_check = Bridge.is_attacked b b.king_sq.(side) opp in
      let effective_depth = if in_check then depth + 1 else depth in

      (* TT probe *)
      let tt_move = ref 0 in
      (match Tt.probe hash with
       | Some entry ->
         tt_move := entry.tt_move;
         if entry.tt_depth >= depth then begin
           let tt_score = Tt.score_from_tt entry.tt_score ply in
           match entry.tt_flag with
           | Tt.Exact ->
             if ply > 0 then begin
               pv.(0) <- entry.tt_move;
               pv_len.(0) <- 1;
               (* Return exact score directly - this is the main TT speedup *)
               alpha := tt_score;
               (* We set a flag to return this score - but we need to be careful *)
             end
           | Tt.LowerBound ->
             if tt_score > !alpha then alpha := tt_score
           | Tt.UpperBound ->
             if tt_score < beta then () (* can't do beta cutoff here easily,
                                           just use the move ordering benefit *)
         end
       | None -> ());

      (* Early TT cutoff for non-PV nodes *)
      let tt_cutoff = ref false in
      (match Tt.probe hash with
       | Some entry when entry.tt_depth >= depth && ply > 0 ->
         let tt_score = Tt.score_from_tt entry.tt_score ply in
         (match entry.tt_flag with
          | Tt.Exact ->
            pv.(0) <- entry.tt_move;
            pv_len.(0) <- 1;
            tt_cutoff := true;
            alpha := tt_score
          | Tt.LowerBound when tt_score >= beta ->
            tt_cutoff := true;
            alpha := beta  (* will return beta *)
          | Tt.UpperBound when tt_score <= alpha_in ->
            tt_cutoff := true
            (* alpha stays at alpha_in, will return alpha_in *)
          | _ -> ())
       | _ -> ());

      if !tt_cutoff then !alpha
      else begin
        (* Null move pruning *)
        let null_pruned = ref false in
        if not in_check && depth >= 3 && !alpha > (-29000) then begin
          let old_ep = b.ep_square in
          let old_side = b.side in
          let old_ply = b.ply in
          b.ep_square <- (-1);
          b.side <- 1 - b.side;
          b.ply <- b.ply + 1;
          let dummy_pv = Array.make 128 0 in
          let dummy_pvl = Array.make 1 0 in
          push_hash si hash;
          let null_score = -(alpha_beta si b (-beta) (-beta + 1) (depth - 3) (ply + 1) dummy_pv dummy_pvl) in
          pop_hash si;
          b.side <- old_side;
          b.ep_square <- old_ep;
          b.ply <- old_ply;
          if null_score >= beta then
            null_pruned := true
        end;

        if !null_pruned then beta
        else begin
          let ml = Bridge.create_move_list () in
          Bridge.generate_all_moves b ml;
          let scores = Array.make 256 0 in
          let use_ply = if ply >= 0 && ply < 128 then ply else 0 in
          for i = 0 to ml.ml_count - 1 do
            scores.(i) <- score_move si b ml.ml_from.(i) ml.ml_to.(i) ml.ml_flag.(i) use_ply
          done;
          (* Boost TT move score *)
          if !tt_move <> 0 then begin
            for i = 0 to ml.ml_count - 1 do
              let enc = encode_move ml.ml_from.(i) ml.ml_to.(i) ml.ml_flag.(i) in
              if enc = !tt_move then scores.(i) <- 20000
            done
          end;
          sort_moves ml scores;

          let best_score = ref (-31000) in
          let best_move = ref 0 in
          let legal_moves = ref 0 in
          let child_pv = Array.make 128 0 in
          let child_pv_len = Array.make 1 0 in
          let i = ref 0 in
          while !i < ml.ml_count && not si.stop do
            let mf = ml.ml_from.(!i) in
            let mt = ml.ml_to.(!i) in
            let mfl = ml.ml_flag.(!i) in
            if Bridge.is_legal_move b mf mt mfl then begin
              incr legal_moves;
              let undo = Bridge.make_move b mf mt mfl in
              push_hash si hash;

              if !legal_moves > 4 && not in_check && mfl = 0 && effective_depth >= 3 then

       COPY "copybooks/types.cpy".
       01 L-MAX-DEPTH            PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
       01 L-TIME-LIMIT-CS        PIC S9(18) COMP-5.
       01 L-BESTMOVE.
          05 M-FROM               PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
          05 M-TO                 PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
          05 M-PROMO              PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
          05 M-FLAGS              PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
          05 M-SCORE              PIC S9(9) COMP-5.
       01 L-OUT-SCORE            PIC S9(9) COMP-5.
       01 L-OUT-NODES            PIC S9(18) COMP-5.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING GAME-STATE L-MAX-DEPTH L-TIME-LIMIT-CS L-BESTMOVE L-OUT-SCORE L-OUT-NODES.
           MOVE 0 TO SS-NODES SS-STOP
           MOVE L-TIME-LIMIT-CS TO SS-TIME-LIMIT-CS
           MOVE 2048 TO SS-TIME-CHECK
           CALL "TIMEUTIL" USING SS-START-CS

           IF SS-TT-INIT NOT = 1
               PERFORM VARYING TT-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL TT-I > TT-SIZE
                   MOVE -1 TO TTE-KEY(TT-I)
               END-PERFORM
               MOVE 1 TO SS-TT-INIT
               MOVE LOW-VALUES TO SS-HEUR
           END-IF
           *> Keep heuristics across moves; clear on init/reset calls (depth <= 0).
           IF L-MAX-DEPTH <= 0
               MOVE LOW-VALUES TO SS-HEUR
           END-IF

           MOVE 0 TO BM-FROM BM-TO BM-PROMO BM-FLAGS BM-SCORE
           MOVE 0 TO LAST-BEST-SCORE
           MOVE 0 TO L-OUT-SCORE

           PERFORM VARYING DEPTH FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL DEPTH > L-MAX-DEPTH OR SS-STOP = 1
               *> Principal variation move from previous iteration
               MOVE BM-FROM  TO PV-FROM
               MOVE BM-TO    TO PV-TO
               MOVE BM-PROMO TO PV-PROMO
               MOVE BM-FLAGS TO PV-FLAGS

               *> Root aspiration window (helps reach deeper depths at same time)
               IF DEPTH >= 3
                   MOVE 50 TO ASP-WINDOW
                   COMPUTE ASP-ALPHA = LAST-BEST-SCORE - ASP-WINDOW
                   COMPUTE ASP-BETA  = LAST-BEST-SCORE + ASP-WINDOW

                   MOVE ASP-ALPHA TO ALPHA
                   MOVE ASP-BETA  TO BETA
                   PERFORM ROOT-SEARCH

                   *> Re-search with full window on fail-high/low
                   IF SS-STOP = 0 AND (BEST-SCORE <= ASP-ALPHA OR BEST-SCORE >= ASP-BETA)
                       COMPUTE ALPHA = 0 - INF-SCORE
                       MOVE INF-SCORE TO BETA
                       PERFORM ROOT-SEARCH
                   END-IF
               ELSE
                   COMPUTE ALPHA = 0 - INF-SCORE
                   MOVE INF-SCORE TO BETA
                   PERFORM ROOT-SEARCH
               END-IF

               *> Time up: keep the previous iteration's best move/score (more stable)
               IF SS-STOP = 1
                   IF PV-FROM NOT = 0
                       MOVE PV-FROM  TO BM-FROM
                       MOVE PV-TO    TO BM-TO
                       MOVE PV-PROMO TO BM-PROMO
                       MOVE PV-FLAGS TO BM-FLAGS
                   END-IF
                   MOVE LAST-BEST-SCORE TO BEST-SCORE
               ELSE
                   *> No legal move => game over
                   IF ROOT-LEGAL-COUNT = 0
                       MOVE 0 TO BM-FROM BM-TO BM-PROMO BM-FLAGS
                       MOVE 0 TO BEST-SCORE
                   ELSE
                       MOVE BEST-SCORE TO LAST-BEST-SCORE
                   END-IF
               END-IF

               *> info line for completed depth (or partial if time ran out)
               MOVE BM-FROM  TO M-FROM OF L-BESTMOVE
               MOVE BM-TO    TO M-TO OF L-BESTMOVE
               MOVE BM-PROMO TO M-PROMO OF L-BESTMOVE
               MOVE BM-FLAGS TO M-FLAGS OF L-BESTMOVE
               MOVE 0        TO M-SCORE OF L-BESTMOVE

               MOVE BEST-SCORE TO L-OUT-SCORE
               MOVE SS-NODES   TO L-OUT-NODES

               CALL "MOVE2UCI" USING L-BESTMOVE UCI-BUF
               MOVE DEPTH TO DEPTH-DISP
               MOVE SS-NODES TO NODES-DISP
               MOVE BEST-SCORE TO SCORE-DISP
               DISPLAY
                   "info depth " FUNCTION TRIM(DEPTH-DISP)
                   " nodes " FUNCTION TRIM(NODES-DISP)
                   " score cp " FUNCTION TRIM(SCORE-DISP)
                   " pv " FUNCTION TRIM(UCI-BUF)
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE BM-FROM  TO M-FROM OF L-BESTMOVE
           MOVE BM-TO    TO M-TO OF L-BESTMOVE
           MOVE BM-PROMO TO M-PROMO OF L-BESTMOVE
           MOVE BM-FLAGS TO M-FLAGS OF L-BESTMOVE
           MOVE 0        TO M-SCORE OF L-BESTMOVE

           MOVE BEST-SCORE TO L-OUT-SCORE
           MOVE SS-NODES   TO L-OUT-NODES
           GOBACK.

def test_worker_reuses_transposition_table_on_repeated_search(self) -> None:
        responses = run_worker_session(
            [
                "position startpos",
                "go depth 2",
                "debug searchstats",
                "go depth 2",
                "debug searchstats",
                "quit",
            ]
        )
        self.assertEqual(responses[0], "ok")
        self.assertRegex(responses[1], r"^bestmove [a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8][qrbn]?$")
        first_stats = parse_stats_line(responses[2])
        self.assertEqual(first_stats["mode"], "depth")
        self.assertEqual(first_stats["target_depth"], "2")
        self.assertEqual(first_stats["depth"], "2")
        self.assertEqual(first_stats["abort"], "0")

        self.assertRegex(responses[3], r"^bestmove [a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8][qrbn]?$")
        second_stats = parse_stats_line(responses[4])
        self.assertEqual(second_stats["mode"], "depth")
        self.assertEqual(second_stats["target_depth"], "2")
        self.assertEqual(second_stats["depth"], "2")
        self.assertEqual(second_stats["abort"], "0")

        self.assertLessEqual(int(second_stats["nodes"]), int(first_stats["nodes"]))
